title: Scalability
description: The system shall be scalable to accommodate a large number of users.

title: Accessibility
description: The system shall be accessible to individuals with Dyslexia, including those with visual impairments.

title: Usability
description: The system shall be user-friendly and easy to navigate.

title: Security
description: The system shall ensure the security and confidentiality of user data.

title: Performance
description: The system shall perform efficiently and effectively, with minimal downtime.

title: Data Privacy
description: The system shall comply with data privacy regulations and ensure the secure storage and transmission of user data.
